flashcards.back:
Page: Logical memory block
Frame: Physical memory block

Same size (typically 4KB)
Page table maps pages → frames

Page# = LA / PageSize
Offset = LA % PageSize

PA = Frame × PageSize + Offset
Frame = PageTable[Page#]

Translation Lookaside Buffer

Cache for page table entries
Hit: 1 memory access
Miss: 2 memory accesses

Offset bits = log2(Page Size)

4KB page → 12 bits
8KB page → 13 bits
1KB page → 10 bits
